sent.description: true when the provider accepted the message; false on terminal failure (4xx-class refusal — bad address, content rejected, etc.).

messageId.description: Provider-assigned message identifier. Empty string when `sent: false`.

provider.description: Provider that actually sent (echoes config.provider; differs only when fallback fires).

idempotencyKey.description: The deterministic Idempotency-Key the runtime derived (SHA-256 prefix over runId+nodeId+to+subject+body). Surfaced for replay-determinism debugging.
